findings.name: VERDANT — Sol Dance Outdoor 2nd Sunday
findings.notes: Sol Dance's 2nd Sunday outdoor event series. VERDANT described as their first outdoor 2nd Sunday of the year. Runs 12PM–4PM. Community ecstatic dance format. Recurring monthly (2nd Sunday).
findings.source_subject: VERDANT We dance outdoors this Sunday!

findings.name: Sol Dance — Monthly 2nd Sunday Dance
findings.venue: Various Atlanta venues (Va-Hi area, indoor/outdoor rotation)
findings.notes: Sol Dance runs regular community dance events on 2nd Sundays. Also hosts special events: NYE Celebration (THRESHOLD at Ambient+Studios), June multi-venue events. Longstanding community touchstone.
findings.source_subject: Tons of June dance events + New venue for July!

findings.name: Sol Dance NYE — THRESHOLD
findings.notes: Sol Dance's annual NYE celebration. 2024 edition called 'THRESHOLD — the Last Dance of 2024 + the First Dance of 2025'. Ambient + Studios venue.
findings.source_subject: Ring in the New Year with Sol Dance!
